nasb.text: Therefore whoever resists authority has opposed the ordinance of God; and they who have opposed will receive condemnation upon themselves.

esv.text: Therefore whoever resists the authorities resists what God has appointed, and those who resist will incur judgment.

cnv.text: 所以抗拒掌權的，就是反對　神所設立的；反對的人必自招刑罰。

ccb.text: 所以，抗拒权柄，就是抗拒上帝的命令，抗拒的人必自招惩罚。

csbs.text: 所以，抗拒掌权的，就是违抗神所设立的；违抗的人，就自招惩罚。
